Class GetItemBuilder<T>

java.lang.Object
dev.hogwai.dynamodb.simplified.builder.GetItemBuilder<T>
Type Parameters:
T - the type of the item
public class GetItemBuilder<T> extends Object
A fluent builder for retrieving an item from a DynamoDB table by its key, with optional projection and consistent read settings. Part of the DynamoDB Simplified library.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    GetItemBuilder(@NonNull software.amazon.awssdk.enhanced.dynamodb.DynamoDbTable<T> table, @NonNull Object partitionKey, @Nullable Object sortKey, @NonNull software.amazon.awssdk.services.dynamodb.DynamoDbClient dynamoDbClient)
    Constructs a new GetItemBuilder for the given table and key.

  • Method Summary

    Method
    Description
    @NonNull GetItemBuilder<T>
    consistentRead(boolean consistentRead)
    Enables or disables strongly consistent reads.
    @NonNull Optional<T>
    execute()
    Executes the get operation and returns the item, if found.
    @NonNull GetItemBuilder<T>
    project(@NonNull String... attributes)
    Restricts the returned attributes to the specified ones.
    @NonNull GetItemBuilder<T>
    project(@NonNull Consumer<ProjectionExpression> projectionBuilder)
    Restricts the returned attributes by configuring a ProjectionExpression via a consumer.

  • Constructor Details

    • GetItemBuilder

      public GetItemBuilder(@NonNull software.amazon.awssdk.enhanced.dynamodb.DynamoDbTable<T> table, @NonNull Object partitionKey, @Nullable Object sortKey, @NonNull software.amazon.awssdk.services.dynamodb.DynamoDbClient dynamoDbClient)
      Constructs a new GetItemBuilder for the given table and key.
      Parameters:
      table - the DynamoDB table
      partitionKey - the partition key value
      sortKey - the sort key value (may be null if the table has no sort key)
      dynamoDbClient - the low-level DynamoDB client (used for projection fallback)

  • Method Details

    • project

      public @NonNull GetItemBuilder<T> project(@NonNull String... attributes)
      Restricts the returned attributes to the specified ones.
      Parameters:
      attributes - the attribute names to include in the result
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • project

      public @NonNull GetItemBuilder<T> project(@NonNull Consumer<ProjectionExpression> projectionBuilder)
      Restricts the returned attributes by configuring a ProjectionExpression via a consumer.
      Parameters:
      projectionBuilder - a consumer that configures the ProjectionExpression
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • consistentRead

      public @NonNull GetItemBuilder<T> consistentRead(boolean consistentRead)
      Enables or disables strongly consistent reads.
      Parameters:
      consistentRead - true for a strongly consistent read, false (the default) for an eventually consistent read
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • execute

      public @NonNull Optional<T> execute()
      Executes the get operation and returns the item, if found.
      Returns:
      an Optional containing the item, or empty if no item exists with the specified key
